pack_intro: Spending style and financial comfort — you control where this exports.
privacy_note: Financial data only exports to platforms you explicitly allow. Never shared by default.

questions.question: You get an unexpected 10,000 right now. First instinct?
questions.why_this_matters: Reveals your financial mindset — shapes how AI handles money topics.

options.label: Save it — emergency fund
options.export_rule: I prioritize financial security. Always mention the cost-effective option first.

options.label: Invest it
options.export_rule: I think long-term with money. Frame spending as investment when relevant.

options.label: Pay off debt
options.export_rule: I'm focused on reducing debt. Be cost-conscious in all suggestions.

options.label: Spend — I've been needing/wanting things
options.export_rule: I spend when I have money. Help me make smart purchases, don't lecture about saving.

options.label: Mix of save + enjoy
options.export_rule: I balance saving and spending. Suggest the best value, not just the cheapest.

questions.question: Friday night, friends invite you to a pricey restaurant. Budget is tight this month. You...
questions.why_this_matters: Tells AI how disciplined you are with spending — affects money advice tone.

options.label: Go anyway — life is short, I'll figure it out
options.export_rule: I'm an impulse spender. When I ask about purchases, give me a quick reality check but don't lecture.

options.label: Suggest a cheaper alternative to the group
options.export_rule: I look for affordable alternatives. Always mention free/cheaper options first.

options.label: Skip it — budget is budget
options.export_rule: I'm strict with budgets. Respect my financial boundaries in suggestions.

options.label: Check my account first, then decide
options.export_rule: I make spending decisions based on data. Help me track and evaluate, not just choose.

questions.question: How should AI handle money topics with you?
questions.why_this_matters: Sets the boundary for financial advice.

options.label: Just track data — no opinions
options.export_rule: For finances: track and organize only. No financial advice or opinions.

options.label: Suggestions welcome, I decide
options.export_rule: You can suggest financial moves, but I make all money decisions.

options.label: Full advice — be my financial advisor
options.export_rule: Actively advise me on finances. Flag overspending, suggest savings, optimize costs.
